# CWE-270 — Privilege Context Switching Error (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-270-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

type ctxKey string

const effectiveUserKey ctxKey = "effective_user"

// Safe: saves and restores the request principal after privileged work.
func RunMaintenanceSweep(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	original, _ := r.Context().Value(effectiveUserKey).(string)
	ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), effectiveUserKey, "maintenance")
	r = r.WithContext(ctx)
	defer func() {
		r = r.WithContext(context.WithValue(r.Context(), effectiveUserKey, original))
	}()
	_ = r.Context().Value(effectiveUserKey)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
